title: Bingo+
body:
![Bingo+ icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j5nulyHA/images/d758936483823fd80e34d2699f07d3c91a214695.png)
![july card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/j5nulyHA/images/446fd00242a6bdfacbd58cf16d3ba608b2b1419e.png)



# Bingo+ for July 2025
1000 downloads 🎉

**Bingo+** is a resource pack that changes how certain Bingo GUI textures look in Hypixel Skyblock.

**This resource pack requires OptiFine!** Latest: [OptiFine HD U M5 (1.8.9)](http://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar&x=8341)\
This pack is made for Minecraft 1.8.9, may not work on other versions!

Found a bug or have a suggestion? [**Join the Discord!**](https://discord.gg/P8rahWWA7b)

## FAQ:
- Some font textures, including the Ⓑ, are invisible/broken.
    - Disable the `Optimized Font Renderer` feature in the [Patcher](https://sk1er.club/mods/patcher) mod.
- When is 1.21 support releasing?
    - When I have time
